title: Section 303!SEC
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Section 303!SEC''' was a non-standard protocol.

[[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] suggested this would be used for [[E-mail]]s because of encrypted and peculiar messages received by [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''

[[Category:Communications]]
